# globalMetaParameters

**Instance Property**

A dictionary of metaparameters that all sound event assets share.

## Declaration

```swift
var globalMetaParameters: [String : PHASEMetaParameter] { get }
```

## Discussion

When you change a value for a metaparameter in this dictionary, every sound event attached to the metaparameter observes the change. The dictionary key is the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameter/identifier] of the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameterDefinition] you pass into [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEAssetRegistry/registerGlobalMetaParameter(metaParameterDefinition:)].



## Registering Global Metaparameters

- **registerGlobalMetaParameter(metaParameterDefinition:)**: Registers a global metaparameter with the asset registry.
